{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Hollow Crown
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Lines of blue-white light speared down from the [[Hollow Crown]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
